positive.stdout:

cnf(u20,axiom,
    female(X0,rg2022) | male(X0,rg2022) | ~at_rg2022(X0)).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~lost_to_rafael(coco_gauff,rg2022)).

    lost_to_iga(X0,rg2022) | ~at_rg2022(X0) | male(X0,rg2022)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    at_rg2022(coco_gauff)).

    ~female(X0,rg2022) | lost_to_iga(X0,rg2022)).

cnf(u37,axiom,
    lost_to_rafael(X0,rg2022) | ranked_wta(X0) | ~at_rg2022(X0)).

    male(X0,rg2022) | ~at_rg2022(X0) | ranked_wta(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~male(X0,rg2022) | lost_to_rafael(X0,rg2022)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define active_major(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
